ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "data_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset (e.g., PO, Invoice) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., procurement system, finance system) */,
  "data_category" TEXT /* Category of the dataset (e.g., purchase orders, invoices) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was updated */,
  "data_volume" INTEGER /* Number of records in the dataset */,
  "data_owner" TEXT /* Department or team responsible for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_records" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset being audited */,
  "field" TEXT /* Field in the dataset that is being audited */,
  "audit_value" TEXT /* Value in the dataset that is being audited */,
  "verification" TEXT /* Verification status of the audit */,
  "audit_verification" TEXT /* Audit verification comments */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks about the audit process */,
  "analytical_review" TEXT /* Analytical review of the data */,
  "audited_by" TEXT /* Name of the auditor who performed the audit */,
  "audited_on" TEXT /* Date when the audit was conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the audit (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "reply" TEXT /* Reply comments related to the audit */,
  "audit_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of audit */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit standard */,
  "audit_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the audit started */,
  "audit_end_time" TEXT /* Time when the audit ended */,
  "audit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the audit in minutes */,
  "audit_tool_used" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the audit */,
  "audit_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the audit was conducted (e.g., production, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_records_audit_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_type_id") REFERENCES audit_types ("audit_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_records_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_records_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES audit_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., auditor, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_types" (
  "audit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit type */,
  "audit_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the audit type (e.g., financial, operational) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audit type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the audit type is active */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the audit type was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date when the audit type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the audit result */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated audit record */,
  "finding" TEXT /* Finding from the audit */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the audit finding */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the finding (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the finding (e.g., Financial, Operational) */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation implementation (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_results_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES audit_records ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_workflows" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the workflow */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit record */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User assigned to the audit task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the audit task */,
  "workflow_status" TEXT /* Current status of the workflow (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the workflow was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date when the workflow was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the audit task (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_workflows_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES audit_records ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit record */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_by" INTEGER /* User who made the comment */,
  "commented_on" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been resolved */,
  "resolved_on" TEXT /* Date when the comment was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_comments_commented_by FOREIGN KEY ("commented_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_comments_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES audit_records ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated audit record */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log entry (e.g., Info, Warning, Error) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the log entry */,
  "logged_by" INTEGER /* User who logged the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_logged_by FOREIGN KEY ("logged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES audit_records ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the standard is active */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the standard was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date when the standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training session */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* User who conducted the training */,
  "training_location" TEXT /* Location where the training was conducted */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training in minutes */,
  "training_materials" TEXT /* Materials used during the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trainings_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trainer is active */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the trainer was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date when the trainer's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "notify_on_audit_start" INTEGER /* Preference for notification on audit start */,
  "notify_on_audit_complete" INTEGER /* Preference for notification on audit completion */,
  "notify_on_discrepancy" INTEGER /* Preference for notification on discovery of discrepancies */,
  "notify_on_comment" INTEGER /* Preference for notification on new comments */,
  "notify_on_workflow_change" INTEGER /* Preference for notification on workflow status changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_discrepancies" (
  "discrepancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discrepancy */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated audit record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discrepancy */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the discrepancy resolution (e.g., Resolved, Unresolved) */,
  "discovered_by" INTEGER /* User who discovered the discrepancy */,
  "discovered_on" TEXT /* Date when the discrepancy was discovered */,
  "resolution_due_date" TEXT /* Due date for resolving the discrepancy */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discrepancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_discrepancies_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES audit_records ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_discrepancies_discovered_by FOREIGN KEY ("discovered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
